goal: units_map_fn[M, N](f, One.1[Unit[M]]) = units_map_fn[M, N](f, unit_one[M])
units_map_fn[M, N](f, unit_one[M]) = monoid_hom_unit[M, N](f, unit_one[M])
units_map_fn[M, N](f, lib(mul).Mul.mul[Unit[M]](u, v)) = units_map_fn[M, N](f, unit_mul[M](u, v))
units_map_fn[M, N](f, unit_mul[M](u, v)) = monoid_hom_unit[M, N](f, unit_mul[M](u, v))
monoid_hom_unit[M, N](f, unit_mul[M](u, v)) = unit_mul[N](monoid_hom_unit[M, N](f, u), monoid_hom_unit[M, N](f, v))
units_map_fn[M, N](f, u) = monoid_hom_unit[M, N](f, u)
units_map_fn[M, N](f, v) = monoid_hom_unit[M, N](f, v)
lib(mul).Mul.mul[Unit[N]](units_map_fn[M, N](f, u), units_map_fn[M, N](f, v)) = lib(mul).Mul.mul[Unit[N]](monoid_hom_unit[M, N](f, u), monoid_hom_unit[M, N](f, v))
lib(mul).Mul.mul[Unit[N]](monoid_hom_unit[M, N](f, u), monoid_hom_unit[M, N](f, v)) = unit_mul[N](monoid_hom_unit[M, N](f, u), monoid_hom_unit[M, N](f, v))
units_map_fn[M, N](f, lib(mul).Mul.mul[Unit[M]](u, v)) = lib(mul).Mul.mul[Unit[N]](units_map_fn[M, N](f, u), units_map_fn[M, N](f, v))

p.c: function[T0: Monoid, T1: Monoid](x0: T0 -> T1) { (x0(T0.1) = T1.1 and forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0(x1 * x2) = x0(x1) * x0(x2) }) = is_monoid_hom[T0, T1](x0) }[Unit[M], Unit[N]](units_map_fn[M, N](f))

not is_monoid_hom[Unit[M], Unit[N]](units_map_fn[M, N](f)) or (One.1[Unit[N]] = units_map_fn[M, N](f, One.1[Unit[M]]) and forall(x0: Unit[M], x1: Unit[M]) { units_map_fn[M, N](f, lib(mul).Mul.mul[Unit[M]](x0, x1)) = lib(mul).Mul.mul[Unit[N]](units_map_fn[M, N](f, x0), units_map_fn[M, N](f, x1)) })
not is_monoid_hom[Unit[M], Unit[N]](units_map_fn[M, N](f)) or units_map_fn[M, N](f, One.1[Unit[M]]) = One.1[Unit[N]]

not is_monoid_hom[Unit[M], Unit[N]](units_map_fn[M, N](f)) or forall(x0: Unit[M], x1: Unit[M]) { units_map_fn[M, N](f, lib(mul).Mul.mul[Unit[M]](x0, x1)) = lib(mul).Mul.mul[Unit[N]](units_map_fn[M, N](f, x0), units_map_fn[M, N](f, x1)) } = true

(forall(x0: Unit[M]) { not is_monoid_hom[Unit[M], Unit[N]](units_map_fn[M, N](f)) or forall(x1: Unit[M]) { units_map_fn[M, N](f, lib(mul).Mul.mul[Unit[M]](x0, x1)) = lib(mul).Mul.mul[Unit[N]](units_map_fn[M, N](f, x0), units_map_fn[M, N](f, x1)) } = true })

(forall(x0: Unit[M], x1: Unit[M]) { not is_monoid_hom[Unit[M], Unit[N]](units_map_fn[M, N](f)) or lib(mul).Mul.mul[Unit[N]](units_map_fn[M, N](f, x0), units_map_fn[M, N](f, x1)) = units_map_fn[M, N](f, lib(mul).Mul.mul[Unit[M]](x0, x1)) })

not (One.1[Unit[N]] = units_map_fn[M, N](f, One.1[Unit[M]]) and forall(x0: Unit[M], x1: Unit[M]) { units_map_fn[M, N](f, lib(mul).Mul.mul[Unit[M]](x0, x1)) = lib(mul).Mul.mul[Unit[N]](units_map_fn[M, N](f, x0), units_map_fn[M, N](f, x1)) }) or is_monoid_hom[Unit[M], Unit[N]](units_map_fn[M, N](f))

not forall(x0: Unit[M], x1: Unit[M]) { units_map_fn[M, N](f, lib(mul).Mul.mul[Unit[M]](x0, x1)) = lib(mul).Mul.mul[Unit[N]](units_map_fn[M, N](f, x0), units_map_fn[M, N](f, x1)) } or units_map_fn[M, N](f, One.1[Unit[M]]) != One.1[Unit[N]] or is_monoid_hom[Unit[M], Unit[N]](units_map_fn[M, N](f))

units_map_fn[M, N](f, One.1[Unit[M]]) != One.1[Unit[N]] or exists(k0: Unit[M], k1: Unit[M]) { units_map_fn[M, N](f, lib(mul).Mul.mul[Unit[M]](k0, k1)) != lib(mul).Mul.mul[Unit[N]](units_map_fn[M, N](f, k0), units_map_fn[M, N](f, k1)) } or is_monoid_hom[Unit[M], Unit[N]](units_map_fn[M, N](f))

not (One.1[Unit[N]] = units_map_fn[M, N](f, One.1[Unit[M]]) and forall(x0: Unit[M], x1: Unit[M]) { units_map_fn[M, N](f, lib(mul).Mul.mul[Unit[M]](x0, x1)) = lib(mul).Mul.mul[Unit[N]](units_map_fn[M, N](f, x0), units_map_fn[M, N](f, x1)) })

not forall(x0: Unit[M], x1: Unit[M]) { units_map_fn[M, N](f, lib(mul).Mul.mul[Unit[M]](x0, x1)) = lib(mul).Mul.mul[Unit[N]](units_map_fn[M, N](f, x0), units_map_fn[M, N](f, x1)) } or units_map_fn[M, N](f, One.1[Unit[M]]) != One.1[Unit[N]]

units_map_fn[M, N](f, One.1[Unit[M]]) != One.1[Unit[N]] or exists(k0: Unit[M], k1: Unit[M]) { units_map_fn[M, N](f, lib(mul).Mul.mul[Unit[M]](k0, k1)) != lib(mul).Mul.mul[Unit[N]](units_map_fn[M, N](f, k0), units_map_fn[M, N](f, k1)) }
not forall(x2: Unit[M], x3: Unit[M]) { units_map_fn[M, N](f, lib(mul).Mul.mul[Unit[M]](x2, x3)) = lib(mul).Mul.mul[Unit[N]](units_map_fn[M, N](f, x2), units_map_fn[M, N](f, x3)) }
exists(k0: Unit[M], k1: Unit[M]) { units_map_fn[M, N](f, lib(mul).Mul.mul[Unit[M]](k0, k1)) != lib(mul).Mul.mul[Unit[N]](units_map_fn[M, N](f, k0), units_map_fn[M, N](f, k1)) }
exists(k0: Unit[M], k1: Unit[M]) { units_map_fn[M, N](f, lib(mul).Mul.mul[Unit[M]](k0, k1)) != lib(mul).Mul.mul[Unit[N]](units_map_fn[M, N](f, k0), units_map_fn[M, N](f, k1)) }
let w0: Unit[M] satisfy { exists(k2: Unit[M]) { units_map_fn[M, N](f, lib(mul).Mul.mul[Unit[M]](w0, k2)) != lib(mul).Mul.mul[Unit[N]](units_map_fn[M, N](f, w0), units_map_fn[M, N](f, k2)) } }
let w1: Unit[M] satisfy { lib(mul).Mul.mul[Unit[N]](units_map_fn[M, N](f, w0), units_map_fn[M, N](f, w1)) != units_map_fn[M, N](f, lib(mul).Mul.mul[Unit[M]](w0, w1)) }
let w2: Unit[M] satisfy { lib(mul).Mul.mul[Unit[N]](units_map_fn[M, N](f, w0), units_map_fn[M, N](f, w2)) != units_map_fn[M, N](f, lib(mul).Mul.mul[Unit[M]](w0, w2)) }
function(x0: Unit[M], x1: Unit[M]) { lib(mul).Mul.mul[Unit[N]](units_map_fn[M, N](f, x0), units_map_fn[M, N](f, x1)) = units_map_fn[M, N](f, lib(mul).Mul.mul[Unit[M]](x0, x1)) }(w0, w2)

goal: exists(k0: MonoidHom[Unit[M], Unit[N]]) { MonoidHom.new[Unit[M], Unit[N]](units_map_fn[M, N](f)) = Option.some(k0) }

p.c: function[T0: Monoid, T1: Monoid](x0: T0 -> T1) { MonoidHom.constraint[T0, T1](x0) = is_monoid_hom[T0, T1](x0) }[Unit[M], Unit[N]](units_map_fn[M, N](f))
not is_monoid_hom[Unit[M], Unit[N]](units_map_fn[M, N](f)) or MonoidHom.constraint[Unit[M], Unit[N]](units_map_fn[M, N](f))
not MonoidHom.constraint[Unit[M], Unit[N]](units_map_fn[M, N](f)) or is_monoid_hom[Unit[M], Unit[N]](units_map_fn[M, N](f))
MonoidHom.constraint[Unit[M], Unit[N]](units_map_fn[M, N](f))

function[T0: Monoid, T1: Monoid](x0: T0 -> T1) { not MonoidHom.constraint[T0, T1](x0) or exists(k0: MonoidHom[T0, T1]) { MonoidHom.new[T0, T1](x0) = Option.some[MonoidHom[T0, T1]](k0) } }[Unit[M], Unit[N]](units_map_fn[M, N](f))
units_map[M, N](f).hom != units_map_fn[M, N](f)
exists(k0: Unit[M]) { units_map_fn[M, N](f, k0) != units_map[M, N](f).hom(k0) }
let w0: Unit[M] satisfy { units_map[M, N](f).hom(w0) != units_map_fn[M, N](f, w0) }
function[T0: Monoid, T1: Monoid](x0: MonoidHom[T0, T1]) { Option.some[MonoidHom[Unit[T0], Unit[T1]]](units_map[T0, T1](x0)) = MonoidHom.new[Unit[T0], Unit[T1]](units_map_fn[T0, T1](x0)) }[M, N](f)

function[T0: Monoid, T1: Monoid](x0: MonoidHom[T0, T1], x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { Option.some[MonoidHom[T0, T1]](x0) != MonoidHom.new[T0, T1](x1) or x0.hom(x2) = x1(x2) }[Unit[M], Unit[N]](units_map[M, N](f), units_map_fn[M, N](f), w0)

goal: units_map_fn[M, N](f, u) = monoid_hom_unit[M, N](f, u)
